description: Jeffrey Martin has been reaching for quiet and stories since he was a kid hiding under the covers with a Discman. He wrote his way through a writing degree, a teaching degree, and years of high school English classes filled with unruly brilliance, all while making records and playing shows whenever he could. Eventually, he left teaching to follow the same dream he encouraged his students to chase. After releasing, Thank God We Left the Garden, he recorded, Alive, July 25, 2025, a no-edits live album captured in Portland with Sam Weber.
title: Jeffrey Martin Concert
